testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.text: StyleAI completely transformed my look! The AI recommendations were spot-on.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.text: The AI analysis is incredibly accurate. It suggested a style I would never have considered.

testimonials.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.text: The virtual try-on feature is amazing. I can experiment without commitment.

features.title: AI-Powered Analysis
features.description: Advanced machine learning analyzes your face shape, features, and hair texture for personalized recommendations.

features.title: Virtual Try-On
features.description: See how different hairstyles look on you before making any changes. Realistic previews in seconds.

features.title: 98% Accuracy
features.description: Our AI has been trained on millions of images to provide highly accurate style suggestions.

features.title: Instant Results
features.description: Get personalized hairstyle recommendations in under 30 seconds. No waiting, no hassle.

faqs.question: How does the AI analysis work?
faqs.answer: Our AI analyzes your face shape, features, hair texture, and personal style preferences.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can cancel at any time and keep access until the billing period ends.

faqs.question: Is my photo data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. Your photos and personal data are protected and can be deleted anytime.

faqs.question: What is the difference between plans?
faqs.answer: Professional includes unlimited recommendations and full style history.

faqs.question: Do you offer refunds?
faqs.answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all plans.

faqs.question: Can I use this for my salon business?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Enterprise plan is designed for salons and professionals.
